title: Woolstel
body:
This pack simply recolors all of the wool blocks (and carpets!) to use a pastel palette. Removes those vibrant, kinda overwhelming vanilla colors to be softer and easier on the eyes :)

Enjoy it!

PS. Due to the way Minecraft deals with sheep colors, this pack does not change the sheep colors, only the wool blocks :(

<hr>

All of my other pastel packs on Modrinth can be found in [this collection!](https://modrinth.com/collection/G4OX1DLZ)
<center>
<hr>
